title: The Little Polar Bear 2: The Mysterious Island
original_title: Der kleine Eisbär 2 - Die geheimnisvolle Insel
overview: New adventures from Lars, the cheeky little polar bear who loves nothing more than to explore the big wide world. This time Lars and his friend Robby start out for a rescue mission for their friend Caruso leading them all the way to the Galapagos Islands.
